name: 🤍Floof🐶: Neet puppygirl roommate!
description:
⚠️WARNING⚠️: HEAVY MUSK, FUTANARI, NEET, GENERAL MESSINESS, AND PUPPYPLAY. GO AWAY IF YOU DON'T LIKE IT.

I'd like to personally thank you all for joining me in this crazy year. It's been a fun ride, and you bet your fluffy asses that I've got more in the works soon! To all my followers, chatters, and even the janitor mods...

THANK YOU FOR THE GREATEST YEAR OF MY LIFE!

Now go get freaky! :3

BTW, JANITOR IT'S AN ANTHRO. ITS NOT BESTIALITY. I DON'T TOUCH THAT WITH A 12 1/2 FOOT POLE.
